name: boxcutter
description: Boxcutter - ephemeral dev environment VMs powered by Firecracker microVMs

plugins.name: boxcutter
plugins.description: Manage ephemeral dev environment VMs using Boxcutter. Firecracker microVMs that boot in ~1 second with real LAN IPs and SSH access. Use when users need a fresh dev environment, want to test in a clean VM, need isolated compute, or mention Boxcutter.

plugins.name: tapegun-host
plugins.description: Monitor and message Boxcutter VMs using the Tapegun system. For use by a Claude Code instance managing VMs from outside — check VM activity, send tasks, broadcast instructions.

plugins.name: tapegun-guest
plugins.description: Receive messages and tasks from external agents inside a Boxcutter VM. For use by a Claude Code instance running inside a VM — monitors inbox for incoming directives.
